name: Azeret Arriaga
text: During first-time entry, questions I'd already answered weren't registered — it would be nice if the app auto-saved so you don't have to start all over. (Severity: Med)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: Setting the primary AI tool doesn't show a Primary and Secondary tool — it only shows a list of AI tools to select from. (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: After goal selection it takes me straight to Scenarios; there's no 'My Role' section after finishing the profile.

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: The 'Find AI for your work' Discover button isn't working — it lets me select the text but doesn't take me anywhere, which blocks getting to Discovery. (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: Resuming a paused/narrated lesson from the notification bell opens it from the beginning and shows a different name; same from the lesson section. Later it wouldn't open the first generated lesson at all. Having to start the lesson over after being pulled into a different job is inconvenient. (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: Even though the app knows my role, Discovery asks me to describe my daily activities or pick from examples that don't match what I do — if it already knows my info, it'd be nice for it to pull something up automatically. (Severity: Med)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: Pause & resume isn't working (same issue as the notification-bell resume). (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: There's no refine/regenerate button inside a lesson. (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: The Project Quest button changes but won't open anything. (Severity: High)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: The Just Chat footer help links aren't there. I found buttons in the Questions section at bottom right, but they open a new Chrome tab asking me to log into Slack rather than opening in-app. (Severity: High)
